user.title: EKZ – Credentials
user.description:
Enter your myEKZ credentials and the TOTP secret key from your authenticator app setup.

If you are currently adding a new authenticator device on my.ekz.ch, the next step will show you the confirmation code to enter there.

data_description.totp_secret: The secret key shown when adding an authenticator app on my.ekz.ch. This is a letter/number string like `JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP` — not the 6-digit code.
data_description.device_name: The name you gave your authenticator device when registering it on my.ekz.ch. Leave blank to auto-select. Required if you have more than one authenticator registered.

confirm.title: EKZ – Confirm Authenticator
confirm.description:
Your current TOTP confirmation code is:

## `{totp_code}`

**TOTP codes are valid for 30 seconds — act quickly.**

If you are currently registering a new authenticator on [my.ekz.ch](https://my.ekz.ch):
1. Enter the code above in the EKZ confirmation field.
2. Enter your desired device name.
3. Click Save/Confirm on the EKZ website.
4. Then click **Submit** below.

If you have already registered the authenticator, simply click **Submit**.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please check your username and password.
error.totp_secret_required: A TOTP secret key is required.
error.invalid_totp_secret_format: The TOTP secret key format is invalid. It should be a Base32 string like `JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP`.
error.invalid_totp: The TOTP code was rejected by EKZ. Make sure the secret key is correct and that your system clock is accurate.
error.sms_2fa_not_supported: SMS-based 2FA is not supported. Please switch to an authenticator app at my.ekz.ch → Account Security → Signing In.
error.no_contracts: Login succeeded but no active contracts were found for this account.
error.ekz_maintenance: The myEKZ portal is currently offline for maintenance. Please try again later.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to myEKZ. Please check your network connection and try again.
